creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
I just had another crash, not with virtualbox, but just trying to play .mp4 video in VLC. I guess this means it's not problem with applications but possibly with video driver (I'm not a developer). Should I open another bug report? I'm using graphics/drm-legacy-kmod, pciconf shows my card as "Haswell-ULT Integrated Graphics Controller".

Here's backtrace.
